hero.title: Eagle Eye
hero.reason: In honor of World Day to Combat Desertification and Drought, this movie's themes of surveillance and control reflect the urgent need to address environmental issues, including desertification.
hero.blurb: Eagle Eye is a gripping thriller that keeps you on the edge of your seat. With its timely themes and intense action sequences, it's a must-watch for fans of the genre.

released.title: Mr. Brooks
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Mr. Brooks is a psychological thriller that explores the dark corners of the human mind, making it a standout film in its genre.
released.blurb: Mr. Brooks is a thought-provoking film that delves into the complexities of the human psyche. With a talented cast, including Kevin Costner, it's a gripping watch that will keep you guessing until the end.

birthday.title: Kiss of the Dragon
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Ken Lo, born June 17, 1959. This martial arts film showcases his impressive skills and is a must-watch for fans of the genre.
birthday.blurb: Kiss of the Dragon is an action-packed film that highlights the incredible Martial Arts skills of Jet Li and Ken Lo. With its intense fight sequences and gripping storyline, it's a thrilling ride from start to finish.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This infamous action film is often cited as one of the worst movies ever made, with a convoluted plot and cringe-worthy dialogue.
awful.blurb: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a mind-bogglingly bad film that will leave you questioning the decisions of the cast and crew. With its nonsensical plot and laughable action sequences, it's a trainwreck that's so bad it's almost entertaining.
